## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run check` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes (24+ cases)
- [ ] `npm run web:build` passes (if web-related)
- [ ] `cargo test --workspace` passes (if Rust core changed)
- [ ] Tests added or updated in `test/core.test.js` or `test/features.test.js`
- [ ] Documentation updated (`README.md`, `CONTRIBUTING.md`, or `docs/`) if user-facing behavior changed
- [ ] Network-touching code exposes an injectable `fetch` for offline tests
- [ ] No new external production dependencies in core (or justified in PR description)
